title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report - DevOps
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 10 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 96%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 100%, and average score is 7.89/10. Total training hours are 216 and scaled cost is 15. Overall effectiveness classification is Effective. Management interpretation: The training program for the DevOps course has demonstrated high levels of engagement and effectiveness, with all trainees completing the course successfully and achieving a perfect pass rate. The overall attendance rate is commendable at 96%, indicating strong participation. The average score of 7.89 out of 10 reflects a solid understanding of the course material, and the feedback rating of 4.6 out of 5 suggests high satisfaction among participants.
insights: DevOps Fundamentals: CI/CD, K8s, Monitoring has an effectiveness score of 92.28 in the selected scope.
The course has achieved a completion rate of 100% and a pass rate of 100%, which are indicative of effective instructional design and delivery.
With a total of 216 training hours delivered at a scaled cost of 15, the ROI proxy stands at 0.0207, suggesting a favorable cost-to-benefit ratio.
recommendations: Maintain the current delivery model and reuse top-performing materials for future cohorts.
To maintain and enhance the effectiveness of the training program, it is recommended to continue monitoring trainee feedback and performance metrics.
Consider implementing advanced topics or follow-up sessions to further engage participants and build on their foundational knowledge.
Additionally, exploring opportunities for mentorship roles for high-performing trainees could foster a culture of continuous learning and development.

checklist.detail: Required sheets and columns were mapped from Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count x total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one valid assessment and pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.
Duplicate rows and numeric ranges were checked before metric generation.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID and pass-status logic
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the selected course catalog.
